verdicts.reason: baked cauliflower with browned cheese on top, bits of ham and onion — right dish, hero-worthy
whole raw cauliflower head with a small bowl of cauliflower rice, not the soup
pale cream root-vegetable soup with croutons and dill — reads as the dish, hero-worthy
cup of chai latte with whole spices and honey — wrong form, this is a drink not overnight oats
dry uncooked chickpeas spilling from a jar, not the Indian curry
two wooden scoops of salt or sugar, completely off-topic
phone-snap of hands prepping sliced potatoes in a pan — in-progress, not the cooked dish
yellow-cast photo of unmelted shredded cheese on dark bread — unusable composition
sweet fruit scones with cranberries, not savory cheese scones
same fruit-scone image — not savory cheese scones
glass jar of flour spilling, completely wrong dish
double cheeseburger with bacon and melted cheese held in hands — strong editorial hero
raw sea bass on ice at a fish market with price tags
Asian wonton dumplings with chili oil and scallions — wrong cuisine
lattice-top apple pie (dessert), not a savory chicken pie
whole chicken leg/thigh in a brown curry sauce — reads as chicken bhuna; bright green wood background is quirky but the dish is right
chicken Caesar with romaine, croutons, parmesan and dressing — clean hero
in-progress browning of chicken pieces in a pan — chasseur is the finished tomato/mushroom/wine sauce, not the sear step
sliced grilled chicken with peppers and onions on a cast-iron skillet — right dish
sliced medium-rare beef steak with fries — chicken-fried steak is breaded cubed steak with cream gravy; also a restaurant 'doughbai' branding on the plate
cookie dough with shaped cookie cutters, completely off-topic
same browning-step pan image as chasseur — jalfrezi is a thick tomato-pepper curry, not plain seared chicken
breaded sliced chicken cutlet on Japanese curry with rice — hero-quality
spaghetti with grilled chicken and olives — not the creamy mild Indian curry
chicken noodle soup with carrots and celery in clear broth — right dish, hero-worthy
chicken in paprika cream sauce with spaetzle and pickles — Hungarian paprikash, right dish
pesto pasta with grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes and arugula — right dish
whole roast chicken on a board, not the savory pie with pastry crust
brand-tagged 'Shawarma King' takeaway box on branded packaging — restaurant branding makes it unusable
same brown-curry chicken image as bhuna; tagine specifically requires visible preserved lemon wedges and Moroccan styling
plain grilled chicken pieces in a pan with sausages behind — missing the iconic creamy orange masala sauce
fajitas-style grilled chicken with tortilla wraps and peppers — no parma ham wrapping visible
